name: AGAINST THE YAKUZA | CELESTIAL VOW RPG (天体の誓い)
description:
FIGHT AGAINST THE YAKUZA!!️

The Yakuza has been terrorizing the country now, even the Police are unable to help out due to the intense power the Yakuza has. Join the alliance - Celestial Vow - to destroy the Yakuza and save Japan!
